notes: Mexico entered the match at full strength with no confirmed injuries or suspensions — Aguirre started 17-year-old Gilberto Mora alongside stalwarts Jimenez and Quinones in attack/midfield. Ecuador had no confirmed pre-match absentees but were weakened by Hincapie's red card late in the match; pre-game, Beccacece's side had fired blanks in two of three group games and relied on a dramatic late win over Germany to qualify.
